title: geranium tuberosum subsp. linearilobum
intro: Geranium tuberosum subsp. linearilobum, also known as the tuberous geranium, is a rare and unique plant species that belongs to the geranium family. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can provide health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Geranium tuberosum subsp. linearilobum can be made by infusing the roots in water or oil, and it is often used in traditional medicine and natural health practices.
